enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Universal Cop'?

The song 'Universal Cop' conveys themes of bravery and justice, reflecting the protagonist's determination to fight against evil.

How does 'Universal Cop' fit into the plot of Singam 3?

In Singam 3, the song underscores the hero's relentless pursuit of justice and showcases his strength and resolve.

Who are the singers of 'Universal Cop'?

The song features the talented vocals of Christopher Stanley and Dinesh Kanakaratnam.

Who wrote the lyrics for 'Universal Cop'?

The lyrics for 'Universal Cop' were penned by the lyricist Viveka.

When was 'Universal Cop' released?

'Universal Cop' was released on November 27, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Universal Cop' from the movie Singam 3 serves as a powerful anthem for justice and heroism. It captures the essence of the protagonist's relentless fight against evil, motivating listeners with its energetic beats and compelling lyrics. The collaboration between Christopher Stanley and Dinesh Kanakaratnam brings a vibrant energy that resonates with fans. Overall, the song evokes feelings of empowerment and determination, making it a perfect fit for action-packed moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Universal Cop from Singam 3 is a high-octane anthem that perfectly encapsulates the spirit of heroism and determination. With the dynamic vocals of Christopher Stanley and Dinesh Kanakaratnam, this track is sure to get your adrenaline pumping. Experience the electrifying collaboration that makes this song a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema!
stanzaMeanings: The one in the police uniform, look, the anger that has been unleashed is intense.
The one who will fight back, who will change. Who is the one that will endure?
There is no connection.
Universal cop, very very sharp.
He is strong enough to change the weight of the situation.
If he strikes, it will be like a storm.
There is no one without a connection.
Universal cop, very very sharp.
He will come with a new style after wearing the uniform.
With just one glance, he will take down the entire place.
If he lets go of one thing, the heart will be troubled for days.
He is the one who stands for justice. He has solutions and also problems.
Universal cop, he is very sharp, universal cop, very very sharp.
That is not a barrier, it is a challenge, he is very rough and tough.
He can show a new kind of route, he is very rough and tough.
He will make everyone aware of what he knows, he will fly high like a bird.
When he smiles, it lights up the room. What he thinks in his heart will happen.
He will have a strong presence in the crowd.
If you see the one who is wrong, he will punish them.
He is the one who will protect the weak and will not let anyone go unpunished.
He will throw away the small smiles and play with everyone.
Universal cop, he is very sharp, universal cop, very very sharp.
